caption: Two men are seated in a room in front of a large television screen that displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in glowing yellow letters. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a skeptical facial expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, resting his chin on his hand. Between them, a smaller inset video window shows a woman in a long dark green dress standing outdoors near water. Behind the men, a soundbar is mounted under the TV, and a shelf is filled with numerous DVDs or CDs. To the left, a small potted cactus is visible. Throughout the sequence, the men remain relatively still, though the man on the right slightly shifts his gaze. The inset video also shows minimal movement as the woman stands in place.
